data.summary: A sun-drenched coastal playground blending world-class surf beaches, thrilling theme parks, and lush rainforest hinterlands.

categories.title: Flights
categories.subtitle: Direct return flights from Auckland to Gold Coast

lineItems.label: Airlines
lineItems.value: Direct return flights with Air New Zealand or Jetstar

lineItems.label: Baggage
lineItems.value: Includes 23kg checked baggage allowance per person

categories.title: Accommodation
categories.subtitle: 6 nights in a mid-range self-contained apartment

lineItems.label: Type & Location
lineItems.value: 2-bedroom family apartment in Broadbeach or Surfers Paradise

lineItems.label: Amenities
lineItems.value: Full kitchen, laundry facilities, and resort-style pool access

lineItems.label: Proximity
lineItems.value: Within 5 minutes walk to the beach and G:link light rail

categories.title: Food & Drink
categories.subtitle: Mix of dining out and light self-catering

lineItems.label: Breakfast & Snacks
lineItems.value: Self-catering in apartment with local supermarket groceries

lineItems.label: Lunch & Dinners
lineItems.value: Casual beachside dining, surf clubs, and local night markets

lineItems.label: Must-Try
lineItems.value: Fresh local seafood at a Surf Lifesaving Club

categories.title: Sightseeing & Activities
categories.subtitle: Theme parks, sky decks, and nature tours

lineItems.label: Theme Parks
lineItems.value: 3-day Village Roadshow pass (Movie World, Sea World, Wet'n'Wild)

lineItems.label: Views
lineItems.value: SkyPoint Observation Deck entry for 360-degree coastal views

lineItems.label: Hinterland
lineItems.value: Day trip to Springbrook National Park to see Natural Bridge

categories.title: Local Transport
categories.subtitle: Public transport passes and airport transfers

lineItems.label: Public Transit
lineItems.value: Go Card for seamless G:link light rail and bus travel

lineItems.label: Airport Transfer
lineItems.value: Rideshare (Uber/DiDi) from Gold Coast Airport to accommodation

lineItems.label: Convenience
lineItems.value: Direct public bus routes connecting theme parks and major hubs

lineItems.label: Connectivity
lineItems.value: Local eSIM data packs or mobile roaming plans

lineItems.label: Emergency Fund
lineItems.value: Cash reserves for unexpected expenses or extra souvenirs

tips: Buy your theme park tickets online in advance to secure combo deals and bypass long ticket booth queues.
Get a Go Card at the airport or tram stations for the cheapest and easiest public transport rates.
Dine at local Surf Lifesaving Clubs (SLSCs) for high-quality, reasonably priced meals directly overlooking the ocean.
Pack high-SPF sunscreen and swim shirts; the Queensland sun is exceptionally strong and will burn quickly.
Consider booking a 2-bedroom apartment with kitchen facilities; cooking even a few meals will dramatically lower your overall budget.
data.visaInfo: New Zealand citizens holding a valid NZ passport are generally granted a Special Category Visa (Subclass 444) automatically on arrival in Australia, subject to meeting standard health and character requirements.
data.bestTimeToVisit: May to October is the ideal time to visit, featuring comfortable, warm daytime temperatures, minimal rainfall, and lower humidity levels perfect for theme parks and outdoor activities.
